ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "test_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test case (e.g., active, inactive, approved) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the test case */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the test case */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who approved the test case */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial metric */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the financial metric (e.g., premium, claims, expenses) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the financial metric (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the financial metric (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discount_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount rate */,
  "rate_name" TEXT /* Name of the discount rate */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the discount rate */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the discount rate */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the discount rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case execution */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case being executed */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was executed */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial metric being calculated */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discount rate used in the calculation */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the test case execution */,
  "executed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who executed the test case */,
  "execution_status" TEXT /* Status of the execution (e.g., success, failure, in progress) */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to execute the test case (in seconds) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_executions_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES discount_rates ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_executions_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_executions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_executions_executed_by FOREIGN KEY ("executed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, auditor, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reporting period (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the reporting period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporting period for the report */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case used to generate the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the financial report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, approved) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the report was approved */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "accessed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who accessed the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_accessed_by FOREIGN KEY ("accessed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id")
)
